name: Aleirtt, the Ogdoadic Dark
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>昏闇</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くらやみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－アレート
desc: If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card, then your opponent can add 1 monster from their GY to their hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 2 of your banished monsters, including a Reptile monster; return them to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Aleirtt, the Ogdoadic Dark" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card, then your opponent can add 1 monster from their GY to their hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 2 of your banished monsters, including a Reptile monster; return them to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Aleirtt, the Ogdoadic Dark" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your GY: You can Tribute 1 monster; Special Summon this card, then your opponent can add 1 monster from their GY to their hand. If this card is Special Summoned: You can target 2 of your banished monsters, including a Reptile monster; return them to the GY. You can only use each effect of "Aleirtt, the Ogdoadic Dark" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's hand
Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
